title: agent-meta.config.json
description: Project configuration for agent-meta sync.py. Controls which agents are generated, which models and memory scopes are used, and how hooks and external skills are activated.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference — enables IDE autocomplete and validation.

_comment.description: Optional free-text comment, ignored by sync.py.

agent-meta-version.description: The agent-meta version this project was last synced with (e.g. '0.16.5').

ai-provider.description: AI provider (legacy single-value field). Use ai-providers for multi-provider support. Claude enables CLAUDE.md management and settings.json creation.

ai-providers.description: List of AI providers. Supports Claude, Gemini, Continue. Replaces the deprecated ai-provider string field. Backward-compatible: ai-provider (string) still works.

platforms.description: Active platform layers. Agents in agents/2-platform/<platform>-*.md override the generic agents.

roles.description: Whitelist of roles to generate. If absent, all known roles are generated.

project.description: Project identity — used in agent filenames and managed blocks.

prefix.description: Short prefix for extension filenames (e.g. 'mpl' → mpl-developer-ext.md).

variables.description: Template variables substituted as {{KEY}} in agent templates.

model-overrides.description: Override the default model per role. Precedence: this > roles.config.json > (none).

memory-overrides.description: Override the default memory scope per role. Precedence: this > roles.config.json > (none).

permission-mode-overrides.description: Override the default permissionMode per role. Precedence: this > roles.config.json > (none).

dod-preset.description: DoD quality profile. Sets defaults for all dod criteria. Individual overrides via 'dod' block. Presets defined in dod-presets.config.json.

dod.description: Definition of Done — override individual criteria from the preset. Precedence: dod > dod-preset > full.

req-traceability.description: Require REQ-IDs in REQUIREMENTS.md, REQ-ID in commit messages, traceability audit. Default: true.

tests-required.description: Require tests for every code change, TDD workflow steps. Default: true.

codebase-overview.description: Require CODEBASE_OVERVIEW.md updates after code changes. Default: true.

security-audit.description: Require security audit before release. Default: false.

debug-mode.description: When true, sync.py injects a debug block into every generated agent. Active agents announce themselves ([Agent: <name>]), log every delegation (→ Delegiere an: ...), and confirm completion (✓ [Agent: <name>] fertig). Default: false — no change to any agent file.

max-parallel-agents.description: Maximum number of agents that a coordinator (orchestrator, feature) may run in parallel via run_in_background. Default: 2. Set to 1 to disable parallelism.

speech-mode.description: Communication style for all agents. Copied as .claude/rules/speech-mode.md — loaded automatically by Claude Code into every agent context. 'full' = default behavior, no rule generated. 'short' = facts only, no filler. 'childish' = playful, simple language with animal/toy analogies. 'caveman' = brutally short, caveman speech. 'asozial' = technically correct but dripping with contempt — New Kids style, insults the user's intelligence.

hooks.description: Opt-in hook activation. Scripts are always synced; registration in settings.json requires enabled: true.

enabled.description: Register this hook in .claude/settings.json (Two-Gate: script must exist in hooks/ layer).

provider-options.description: Provider-specific options. Each key is a provider name (Claude, Gemini, Continue).

generate-prompts.description: Generate .continue/prompts/<role>.md as invokable slash-commands. Works with any local LLM — no tool calling required.

prompt-mode.description: Content mode for generated prompts. 'full' = complete agent body. 'slim' = compact role + core rules only (~80 lines).

gitignore.description: Configurable .gitignore behavior for generated and settings files. Defaults match current behavior (local: true, generated: false, settings: false).

local.description: Gitignore local/personal files (.claude/settings.local.json, CLAUDE.personal.md, sync.log). Default: true (gitignored).

generated.description: Gitignore all generated directories (agents/, rules/, hooks/, commands/) for all active providers. Default: false (committed). Set true to follow 'generate, don't store' principle.

settings.description: Gitignore provider settings files (settings.json, GEMINI.md, config.yaml) for all active providers. Default: false (committed). Note: CLAUDE.md is never gitignored (contains handwritten sections).

lifecycle-triggers.description: Agent tasks to run automatically on git lifecycle events (commit, merge, version bump, release). Requires lifecycle-check hook to be enabled.

external-skills.description: Opt-in external skill activation. Two-Gate: approved in external-skills.config.json AND enabled here.

enabled.description: Generate wrapper agent for this skill.

gitignore.description: Add .claude/skills/<skill-name>/ to the .gitignore managed block. Use when the skill copies large or generated files that should not be committed.

lifecycleTriggerList.description: List of agent tasks to run for this lifecycle event.

agent.description: Agent role to delegate the task to (e.g. 'documenter', 'validator').

task.description: Task description passed to the agent.
